generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and security, I worry about the growing burden our allies are placing on us. While I support alliances, we can't keep carrying the weight alone. Look at the recent reports - our partners are cutting defense budgets while expecting us to maintain deterrence. It's not sustainable. We need a serious discussion about fair burden-sharing before our own security is compromised. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
